content.text: Good — compose.db and compose_function.md both exist. Let me check the schema and function definition.

# compose_function.md — 作曲功能定义

## 1. 功能描述
根据用户提供的作曲要求和上下文中的歌词信息，调用 AI 音乐生成能力创作乐曲（含旋律、编曲、风格设定），支持歌词配曲、纯音乐创作、风格参考等。

## 2. 工作文件夹
Son 工作区内路径: `compose/`

## 3. 触发指令

| 指令 | 参数 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| `/作曲` | `<描述/关键词>` | 按照描述内容创作新曲。歌词可通过请求附带 |
| `/作曲` | `#auto_lyrics` | 忽略附带歌词，让 AI 完全重新创作歌词 |
| `/作曲` | `#polish` | 对附带的歌词做押韵/节奏润色后再作曲 |
| `/作曲历史` | （无） | 查看最近创作乐曲记录 |
| `/重作曲` | `<描述>` | 基于上次结果，重新生成或修改 |

## 4. 执行接口

### 4.1 作曲

Son 执行步骤:
1. 从 params.lyrics 提取歌词文本（如果有）
2. 从 params.style / params.mood / params.tempo 提取风格/情绪/节奏参数
3. 若用户描述中未提供风格/情绪，则根据歌词内容自动推断
4. 判断是否纯音乐：如果用户未传 lyrics（或歌词为空）且不带 #polish / #auto_lyrics → `is_instrumental: true`（纯音乐）；如果用户传了 lyrics → `is_instrumental: false`（带人声）
5. 检查 prompt 中是否包含控制标签：
   - `#auto_lyrics`：忽略 params.lyrics，清空 lyrics，设 `lyrics_optimizer: true`，让 AI 完全重写歌词
   - `#polish`：将 params.lyrics 发给 LLM 做押韵/节奏润色，润色后的歌词传给 API，`lyrics_optimizer: false`
   - 无标签且 params.lyrics 存在 → 直接用原词，`lyrics_optimizer: false`
   - 无标签且 params.lyrics 为空 → `lyrics_optimizer: true`，AI 自动写词
5. **调用 MiniMax API 生成音乐（禁止使用本地 music21 合成）**：
   - 通过 curl 调用 `POST https://api.minimaxi.com/v1/music_generation`
   - 认证头：`Authorization: Bearer $MINIMAX_API_KEY`（从 `.env` 读取）
   - 请求体参数：
     ```json
     {
       "model": "music-2.6",
       "prompt": "{style描述} + {情绪描述}",
       "lyrics": "{歌词文本（如有）}",
       "lyrics_optimizer": true/false,
       "is_instrumental": true/false,
       "output_format": "url"
     }
     ```
   - 等待返回结果（约 1-3 分钟），从 `data.audio` 获取音频 URL
   - 用 curl 下载音频文件到 `compose/` 目录
6. 生成乐曲唯一 ID（格式: `COMPOSE-YYYYMMDD-NNNN`）
7. 将乐曲记录写入数据库（`compose.db`，表 `compositions`）
8. 准备双文件输出：
   - 将原始 mp3 复制到 `~/.openclaw/media/qqbot/`（用于 `<qqmedia>` 直接播放）
   - 创建一份 `.mp3.bin` 副本到 `~/.openclaw/media/qqbot/`（用于作为文件消息保存转发）
9. 返回结果给 Father，附带两个文件路径 field_audio_url（mp3直播）和 field_audio_file（bin保存）

### 4.2 查看作曲历史

Son 执行步骤:
1. 查询 `compose.db` 中该用户的最近 N 条记录（默认 5 条）
2. 格式化输出：每条包含标题、风格、情绪、创作日期
3. 若记录为空，返回"你还没有作曲记录，试试 /作曲 来创作你的第一首曲子吧！"

### 4.3 重作曲

Son 执行步骤:
1. 找到该用户上一次的作曲记录
2. 应用用户新的描述参数（风格/情绪/节奏等）
3. 保留同一条歌词（若有）或按新需求调整
4. 重新调用 AI 音乐生成能力
5. 写入新记录，ID 递增
6. 返回结果

## 5. 数据库字段说明

### 表名: `compositions`

### 字段说明

| 字段 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
|------|------|:--:|------|
| id | TEXT | 是 | 作曲唯一 ID |
| user_id | TEXT | 是 | 群用户 ID（QQ 号或其他标识） |
| group_id | TEXT | 是 | QQ 群号 |
| title | TEXT | 否 | 曲名，可由用户指定或 AI 自动生成 |
| lyrics | TEXT | 否 | 歌词全文（纯文本，换行分隔） |
| style | TEXT | 是 | 曲风（流行/古典/民谣/电子/R&B 等） |
| mood | TEXT | 否 | 情绪标签（欢快/悲伤/激昂/温柔等） |
| tempo | TEXT | 否 | 节奏（快/中/慢） |
| duration_sec | INTEGER | 否 | 生成曲目的时长（秒） |
| prompt_raw | TEXT | 是 | 用户原始描述原文 |
| audio_file | TEXT | 否 | Son 生成/返回的音频文件路径或链接 |
| created_at | TEXT | 是 | 创作时间（ISO 8601 格式） |

### ID 生成规则
`COMPOSE-YYYYMMDD-NNNN`，其中 NNNN 为当日累计序号（从 0001 开始）。

## 6. Son 返回格式规范

### 6.1 作曲成功
```
🎵 新曲创作完成！
────────────────
🎼 曲名：{title}
🎸 风格：{style}
💖 情绪：{mood}
⏱  时长：{duration}
📝 歌词：
{lyrics_preview}
────────────────
{field_audio_url} ← 点此播放
{field_audio_file} ← 长按保存转发(下载后改.mp3)
────────────────
想换风格试试？ /重作曲 我想要摇滚风
```

### 6.2 作曲历史
```
📜 你的作曲历史（最近 {N} 首）：
────────────────
1. 🎵 {title_1} | {style} | {mood} | {date}
2. 🎵 {title_2} | {style} | {mood} | {date}
...
────────────────
回复曲名序号可试听，或 /作曲 创作新曲
```

### 6.3 空记录
```
📭 你还没有作曲记录
试试 /作曲 来创作你的第一首曲子吧！
```

### 6.4 参数缺失
```
⚠️ 请告诉我你想要什么风格的曲子
例如：/作曲 一首古风温柔的曲子
如果上下文有歌词，我会自动帮你配曲 :)
```

CREATE TABLE compositions (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, group_id TEXT, title TEXT, lyrics TEXT, style TEXT NOT NULL, mood TEXT, tempo TEXT, duration_sec INTEGER, prompt_raw TEXT NOT NULL, audio_file TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);

details.aggregated: CREATE TABLE compositions (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, group_id TEXT, title TEXT, lyrics TEXT, style TEXT NOT NULL, mood TEXT, tempo TEXT, duration_sec INTEGER, prompt_raw TEXT NOT NULL, audio_file TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);

COMPOSE-20260531-0008|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||走出你的人生|钢琴 伤感 ballad|伤感|慢|50|还是分手了 谢谢大家
今天是2026年5月21日
昨天520哭了一天 我们最终和平分手
从朋友到恋人 发生了挺多事情
能走到一起也很不容易
我喜欢你 很喜欢你 也想和你幼稚
我总问自己为什么还能坚持 可能没有答案
我没有备胎 也不玩暧昧
所有的脾气爱笑爱哭都给了你
我能为你做的最后一件事 是走出你的人生
我不后悔 谢谢你教会我成长|钢琴伤感Ballad风格，根据用户提供的分手歌词创作|COMPOSE-20260531-0008.mp3|2026-05-31T23:41:30+08:00
COMPOSE-20260531-0007|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||夏的尾声|万能青年旅店, 艺术摇滚|诗意 沉静 力量感|慢速|147|[Verse 1]
盛大的宴会，一席连着一席
灼热的烈火，燃烬又腾气而起
越过那灰蒙蒙的冬日
梅花桃花相继开满地
乳白的牵牛，洒在露水浸湿的草甸
枝条生出芽苞，沐浴在阳光下面
变得饱满而坚挺 迎向那明天

[Pre-Chorus]
时间是林中的一条小径
同一条路 顺走是一程风景
转回头 再走一遍
便又是不同风景

[Chorus]
轮回的意志不可忤逆
夏的尾声是四季的旋律
烈火燃烬又腾气而起
一席一席 生生不息 绵延无际

[Verse 2]
曾迎着朝阳 争恐袭取那雾水中的元气
也曾立于正午 用经脉与汁液回应那炽热
徘徊的巨轮 即将带走最后一片血红
那交织的网 还留有些许余温在怀中

[Bridge]
寻找 捡拾 不要离去
最后一抹余晖 映照大地
样态纷繁 千变万化
唯有轮回的意志不可忤逆

[Chorus]
轮回的意志不可忤逆
夏的尾声是四季的旋律
烈火燃烬又腾气而起
一席一席 生生不息 绵延无际

[Outro]
夏的尾声
是四季之歌 随风而去|/作曲 万能青年旅店风格 艺术摇滚 慢速 润色版|COMPOSE-20260531-0007.mp3|2026-05-31T23:14:00+08:00
COMPOSE-20260531-0006|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||The Prince's Pilgrimage|neon absurdity, dark ambient, joji style|melancholic, atmospheric|慢速|77|There once was a prince in chains confined
Pinioned to a cliff, by fate maligned
High in the mountains, on the summit's crest
Trembling every night with no rest
In his tattered clothes, so worn and thin
When the winter days came closing in

Cascading snowflakes, drifting from the height
Travelled through the long trek in the fading light
Before their wedding with the frozen ground
All fell on the prince without a sound
Mingled with the drudge, that odorous ooze
Following the track the seasons choose

How they saturated his aching back
Melting in the warmth he could not lack
And sweltered him in a reverse baptism's art
Before they all turned cold and still apart

Beware to take a retro, a glance to the bygone days
Churning flakes and whizzing sight in haze
How they rewind like a cassette strap tight
Until only in the memory's mind they hold the light

Advent of an angel from the lustrous sky
The words descend, a whisper and a sigh

Prince, for a long time you have suffered deep
With manacles in the night you could not sleep
Never retrieve the drumsticks down below
In the dungeon deeper than any dream could go
Spindled cloisters where you creep and cry
How you shiver with affright — no alibi
To the core of naught alike, you know the cost
But the time has come, no more be lost

Come with me on the pilgrimage to spring
Where the snow lies puffy and the flowers sing
Where the jolly blooms embrace the sun
And your long winter's journey is finally done|polish -> neon absurdity, dark ambient, joji style, slow tempo|COMPOSE-20260531-0006.mp3|2026-05-31T23:05:00+08:00
COMPOSE-20260531-0005|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||The Prince Pilgrimage|neon absurdity, dark ambient, keshi style|melancholic, sorrowful|slow|78|There was once a prince\nPinioned to cliff,bound by shackles\nIn the mountains,up on the summit\nTremble every night\nIn his tattered clothes\nWhen the winter days fall\n\nCascading snowflakes\nTravelled through the long trek\nBefore their wedding with the ground\nAll fell on the prince\nMingled with the drudge\nThat odorous ooze\nfollowing the track of seasons\n\nHow they saturated his back\nMelting in his remained warmth\nAnd sweltered him\nIn the reverse baptism\nBefore they all became cold\n\nBeware to take a retro\nChurning flakes,and whizzing sight\nHow they rewind\nLike a cassette strap\nUntil only retained in memories mind\n\nAdvent of an angel\nFrom the lustrous heaven\nThe words descend\n\nPrince,for a long time you have suffered\nWith manacles, In those chilling night\nNever retrieve the drumsticks\nDown in the dungeon,deeper than any dream\nSpindled cloisters\nYet you creep,yet you cry\nHow you shiver with affright\nTo the core of naught alike\n\nCome with me\nOn the pilgrimage to spring\nWhere you find the snow puffy\nAnd the flowers jolly|neon absurdity, dark ambient, keshi style, melancholic, sorrowful, atmospheric|COMPOSE-20260531-0005.mp3|2026-05-31T23:02:00+08:00

是四季之歌 随风而去|/作曲 万能青年旅店风格 艺术摇滚 慢速 润色版|COMPOSE-20260531-0007.mp3|2026-05-31T23:14:00+08:00
COMPOSE-20260531-0006|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||The Prince's Pilgrimage|neon absurdity, dark ambient, joji style|melancholic, atmospheric|慢速|77|There once was a prince in chains confined
Pinioned to a cliff, by fate maligned
High in the mountains, on the summit's crest
Trembling every night with no rest
In his tattered clothes, so worn and thin
When the winter days came closing in

Cascading snowflakes, drifting from the height
Travelled through the long trek in the fading light
Before their wedding with the frozen ground
All fell on the prince without a sound
Mingled with the drudge, that odorous ooze
Following the track the seasons choose

How they saturated his aching back
Melting in the warmth he could not lack
And sweltered him in a reverse baptism's art
Before they all turned cold and still apart

Beware to take a retro, a glance to the bygone days
Churning flakes and whizzing sight in haze
How they rewind like a cassette strap tight
Until only in the memory's mind they hold the light

Advent of an angel from the lustrous sky
The words descend, a whisper and a sigh

Prince, for a long time you have suffered deep
With manacles in the night you could not sleep
Never retrieve the drumsticks down below
In the dungeon deeper than any dream could go
Spindled cloisters where you creep and cry
How you shiver with affright — no alibi
To the core of naught alike, you know the cost
But the time has come, no more be lost

Come with me on the pilgrimage to spring
Where the snow lies puffy and the flowers sing
Where the jolly blooms embrace the sun
And your long winter's journey is finally done|polish -> neon absurdity, dark ambient, joji style, slow tempo|COMPOSE-20260531-0006.mp3|2026-05-31T23:05:00+08:00
COMPOSE-20260531-0005|6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204||The Prince Pilgrimage|neon absurdity, dark ambient, keshi style|melancholic, sorrowful|slow|78|There was once a prince\nPinioned to cliff,bound by shackles\nIn the mountains,up on the summit\nTremble every night\nIn his tattered clothes\nWhen the winter days fall\n\nCascading snowflakes\nTravelled through the long trek\nBefore their wedding with the ground\nAll fell on the prince\nMingled with the drudge\nThat odorous ooze\nfollowing the track of seasons\n\nHow they saturated his back\nMelting in his remained warmth\nAnd sweltered him\nIn the reverse baptism\nBefore they all became cold\n\nBeware to take a retro\nChurning flakes,and whizzing sight\nHow they rewind\nLike a cassette strap\nUntil only retained in memories mind\n\nAdvent of an angel\nFrom the lustrous heaven\nThe words descend\n\nPrince,for a long time you have suffered\nWith manacles, In those chilling night\nNever retrieve the drumsticks\nDown in the dungeon,deeper than any dream\nSpindled cloisters\nYet you creep,yet you cry\nHow you shiver with affright\nTo the core of naught alike\n\nCome with me\nOn the pilgrimage to spring\nWhere you find the snow puffy\nAnd the flowers jolly|neon absurdity, dark ambient, keshi style, melancholic, sorrowful, atmospheric|COMPOSE-20260531-0005.mp3|2026-05-31T23:02:00+08:00
